  Crude Oil Support at 81⁠.90⁠: Volume Profile Buyers Step In 
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FCL1%21%2F2dnEUIl2-Crude-Oil-Support-at-81-90-Volume-Profile-Buyers-Step-In%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_>
CL1!, 30
Crude Oil is approaching a key support at 81⁠.90, built from a strong 
rejection of lower prices⁠.
Heavy buying volume entered this zone, showing where institutions stepped 
in and reversed the move⁠. This makes it a high-probability reaction area 
on a pullback⁠. Watch for a bounce, but stay cautious around Iran-related 
news that could spike volatility⁠.
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FCL1%21%2F2dnEUIl2-Crude-Oil-Support-at-81-90-Volume-Profile-Buyers-Step-In%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_>

<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FCL1%21%2F2dnEUIl2-Crude-Oil-Support-at-81-90-Volume-Profile-Buyers-Step-In%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_>

  Strong Rejection on AUD/USD – Key Short Level at 0⁠.7205 
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FAUDUSD%2F00MpFoMZ-Strong-Rejection-on-AUD-USD-Key-Short-Level-at-0-7205%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D>
AUDUSD, 30
AUD/USD formed a strong resistance at 0⁠.7205 after aggressive buying got 
rejected⁠. Volume Profile shows a significant volume cluster where sellers 
stepped in and reversed the move⁠. This marks a key level where sellers may 
defend again⁠. Plan is simple, wait for a pullback to 0⁠.7205 and look for 
a short⁠.
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FAUDUSD%2F00MpFoMZ-Strong-Rejection-on-AUD-USD-Key-Short-Level-at-0-7205%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D>

payload.body:
[image: TradingView] 
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2F&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D> 

    
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fu%2FTrader_Dale%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D> 
Trader_Dale 
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fu%2FTrader_Dale%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D> 
  that you follow published a new idea
  EUR/USD⁠: Gap Fill Strategy + Volume Zone Reaction 
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FEURUSD%2F2weYgLtU-EUR-USD-Gap-Fill-Strategy-Volume-Zone-Reaction%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D>
EURUSD, 30
This setup focuses on trading gaps using heavy volume zones formed before 
the gap⁠. The key idea is to wait for price to first close the gap and then 
react at the beginning of the high-volume area⁠. This reaction often 
provides a strong entry with a high win rate⁠. It’s a rare setup, 
especially on EUR/USD, but very effective when it appears⁠.
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FEURUSD%2F2weYgLtU-EUR-USD-Gap-Fill-Strategy-Volume-Zone-Reaction%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D>
  Open idea 
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FEURUSD%2F2weYgLtU-EUR-USD-Gap-Fill-Strategy-Volume-Zone-Reaction%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_%2BIn19fQ%3D%3D> 

  Thanks for reading, 
Team TradingView
23rd Floor, 1330 Avenue Of The Americas
New York, NY 10019, USA

[image: TradingView] 

    Trader_Dale 
  that you follow published a new idea
  NZD/CHF Resistance at 0⁠.4639⁠: Sellers’ Key Level
NZDCHF, 30
NZD/CHF is approaching a strong resistance at 0⁠.4639, where heavy selling 
previously triggered a sharp move down⁠. This level is based on a 
high-volume zone from the weekly profile, showing where sellers stepped 
in⁠. With added confluence from a fair value gap, this area could offer a 
solid short opportunity on a pullback⁠.

  that you follow published a new idea
  EUR/USD Long Idea⁠: Volume Profile + FVG Confluence at 1⁠.1453
EURUSD, 30
EUR/USD shows a strong support at 1⁠.1453, where a significant Volume 
Profile cluster, Fair Value Gap, and previous resistance turned support all 
align⁠. This confluence suggests strong buyer activity, possibly 
institutional⁠. The plan is to wait for a pullback to this level and look 
for a long entry⁠.

[image: TradingView] 

    Trader_Dale 
  that you follow published a new idea
  GBP/USD Resistance at 1⁠.3390 | Volume Profile Gap Setup
GBPUSD, 30
GBP/USD opened with a significant gap, and the start of that gap aligns 
with a heavy volume zone at 1⁠.3390⁠. This level should act as resistance 
if the price pulls back into it⁠. The plan is simple⁠: wait for the 
pullback to the level and look for a short as the market works to fill the 
gap⁠.
<https://snowplow-pixel.tradingview.com/com.tradingview/redirect?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tradingview.com%2Fchart%2FGBPUSD%2FLOrpHZoY-GBP-USD-Resistance-at-1-3390-Volume-Profile-Gap-Setup%2F%3Futm_source%3Dnotification_email%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_campaign%3Dnotification_publish&e=ue&ue_>

payload.subject: Welcome to the TradingView family
payload.body:
[image: TradingView] 

  
  
[image: Alex Honnold - Free Climber, our ambassador] 
 
Hey there, trader 
 

We can tell you're just itching to jump into the action. Why don’t you take 
a look at your first chart and get familiar with our platform? The chart is 
the trader’s bread and butter – you can never be too comfortable with it!
 
Visit a chart <https://www.tradingview.com/chart/?utm_source=email> 
  

*Was this email helpful?*

Let us know what you think
[image: None] <https://tradingview.typeform.com/to/Cmv3Aqrj> 

or
[image: None] <https://tradingview.typeform.com/to/WJjt2yqb> 
  
  
Thanks for reading, 
The TradingView Team 
470 Olde Worthington Rd., Suite 200
Westerville OH 43082 
App Store 
<https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/tradingview-trading-community-charts-and-quotes/id1205990992> 
    Google Play 
<https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tradingview.tradingviewapp> 
    Desktop app <https://www.tradingview.com/desktop> 
Facebook <https://www.facebook.com/tradingview>     YouTube 
<https://www.youtube.com/@TradingView>     LinkedIn 
<https://www.linkedin.com/company/tradingview>     Twitter 
<https://twitter.com/tradingview> 
  
  

This email was sent to wiryawankemal@gmail.com
because you signed up at TradingView.com <https://www.tradingview.com/>. If 
you don't want to receive this type of emails anymore, you can unsubscribe 
<https://www.tradingview.com/u/wiryawankemal/#notifications> at any time.
